arts.sum: Reach PLC's very own football finance expert Dave Powell has explained what impact a legal 'win' for Manchester City will have over the Premier League.

arts.sum: The Newcastle forward (left), who has been in talks over a new deal with the club, came close to joining the Reds from his current team as the Magpies scrambled to meet PSR regulations.

arts.ttl: What APT vote withdrawal means for Premier League rivals after Man City's 'legal victory'
arts.athr: mirrornews@mirror.co.uk (Jamie Gardner, PA Chief Sports Reporter)
arts.sum: The decision to withdraw a vote to amend the Premier League’s associated party transaction (APT) rules has led to speculation City may have won a legal challenge against those regulations

arts.ttl: Jamal Musiala: Man City, Man United, Real Madrid 'dealt blow' in pursuit of Bayern Munich star
arts.sum: European giants including Real Madrid, Manchester City, Manchester United and Arsenal reportedly suffer a blow in their pursuit of Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala.

arts.ttl: Manchester City land first blow in legal wrangle with the Premier League
arts.sum: In the legal battle between Manchester City and the Premier League, in which the English champions face more than 130 charges for financial irregularities, the Mancunian team is also playing its cards, and the first hand has been taken by Pep Guardiola’s team. This would consist of suing the English league for “damages” in reference to the democratic voting system (14 out of 20 votes), accusing it of “discrimination against the owners of the Gulf” and, above all, trying to put an end to the rules on transactions with associated parties, the so-called APT rules, which in the football club’s opinion, are illegal.

arts.ttl: Man City development could be huge for Newcastle United after Premier League vote dropped
arts.sum: Manchester City, who separately deny 115 alleged breaches of the top-flight's financial rules, have challenged the validity of the Premier League's associated party transactions (APT) regulations, which ensure all commercial deals with companies linked to a club's owners are independently assessed to establish they are of fair market value. The champions have stated that 18 rival clubs only voted in these regulations so that they could'safeguard their own commercial advantages' following Newcastle's takeover nearly three years ago.

arts.ttl: Liverpool manager Arne Slot shows true colours with injury message to Man City star Rodri
arts.sum: The latest news involving Manchester City as Liverpool manager, Arne Slot, shares a message to Rodri after the Spanish talisman picked up a serious knee injury.
